title: Unlocking Security Context with Microsoft Sentinel Graph
description:
Principal Product Manager Yaniv Shasha shares how Microsoft Sentinel Graph turns fragmented data tables into a unified, connected security knowledge graph that reveals relationships traditional logs can’t. See how first-party graphs in Microsoft Defender and Microsoft Purview provide that foundation and how organizations can extend it by modeling their own domain-specific graphs for employees, assets, processes, CVEs, tickets, and more.
